message:
Running command: # Just find the scripts directory directly
ls /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/ | head -10
echo "---"
# SCRIPTS_DIR should be the parent of 'openroad/' subfolder
# So: /nix/store/.../site-packages/librelane/scripts
echo "SCRIPTS_DIR = /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts"
